pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup and verifier logic (verifier.py checks for '#1e293b', 'rgb(30, 41, 59)', or '1e293b', and export_result.sh greps for '1e293b').

Confirmed via setup_task.sh (downloads a React logo or creates a base64 fallback at /home/ga/client-assets/client-logo.png) and verified by verifier.py and export_result.sh checking for 'client-logo.png'.

privileged_info_summary: The target WordPress login background color is explicitly set to #1e293b and verified by checking the verifier script. The client logo filename is explicitly defined as client-logo.png in the setup script, downloaded from Wikimedia or generated as a 1x1 synthetic image.
